# SCDynamicStoreKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ System Configuration ](/documentation/systemconfiguration)

- [ SCDynamicStoreKey ](/documentation/SystemConfiguration/scdynamicstorekey)

-  SCDynamicStoreKey 

API Collection# SCDynamicStoreKey

## [Overview](/documentation/SystemConfiguration/scdynamicstorekey#Overview)

The `SCDynamicStoreKey` programming interface provides convenience functions that an application can use to create a correctly formatted dynamic store key for accessing specific items in the dynamic store. An application can then use the resulting string in any function that requires a dynamic store key.

## [Topics](/documentation/SystemConfiguration/scdynamicstorekey#topics)
